TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Tjana'asiya = Gaga mniq Pingtung Rayyisyang ka alang Tjana'asiya. 124 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 427 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 97% niqan 413 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 3% niqan 14 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan91%, Bunun1%, Cou1%, ni rahuq na o3%.
S.PHON: = tɟana'asija = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ ɾajjisjaŋ ka alaŋ tɟana'asija. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, bunun*%, ʦou*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Tjana'asiya = Gaga mniq Pingtung Rayyisyang ka alang Tjana'asiya. 124 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 427 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 97% niqan 413 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 3% niqan 14 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Paiwan91%, Bunun1%, Cou1%, ni rahuq na o3%.
S.PHON: = tɟana'asija = gaga mniq piŋtuŋ ɾajjisjaŋ ka alaŋ tɟana'asija. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, paiwan**%, bunun*%, ʦou*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
